testcase.name: verifyCheckout
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[@name='proceedToRetailCheckout']"}.
